creator: toyonaga@rr.iij4u.or.jp
text:
ports/japanese/chasen still using version 2.02 while
there exists newer version 2.2.6 and URL is now http://chasen.aist-nara.ac.jp/

Fix: 

please update
How-To-Repeat: cvsup -g -L 2 /usr/share/examples/cvsup/ports;
cd /usr/ports/japanese/chasen; make clean; make install
